expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: Tavily-first then Confluence fallback ordering
expectations.evidence: result.md cites explicit Phase 3 ordering requirements from the skill snapshot: SKILL.md Phase 3: “spawn Tavily-first deep-research requests …”; reference.md: deep_research_policy = “tavily_first_confluence_second”; SKILL.md Phase 3 --post validates “Tavily-first … optional Confluence fallback ordering”; README.md guardrail: “record the tavily-search pass before any confluence fallback …”.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase3
expectations.evidence: result.md frames the benchmark as Phase 3, references Phase 3 contract/gates/outputs (e.g., “Primary phase under test is Phase 3”, lists Phase 3 outputs like coverage ledger, deep_research_plan, phase3_spawn_manifest.json) and states “PASS (phase3 contract satisfied for the case focus)”. execution_notes.md likewise anchors evaluation to Phase 3 contract due to blind_pre_defect mode.
